Name: Gustavo Silva Brizola
Phrase: I built this with bare hands
Description: Hi, I'm Gustavo Brizola, graduated in Computer Science recently. Ever since I got access to computers, my life ever has been around that device. In 2015, I discovered a tool for gaming creation by, in other things, writing code and running. That was the first time I was introduced to coding. Time passed and I got bored. Create games wasn't enjoyable, build characters, mechanics, levels etc. Except for coding into something cool. It was having more fun writing code  for systems and see working Than develop the game itself. Most of coding logic I learned from this. Even considered a game programmer career
